name: insurance claims adjusters in mid-sized firms processing 10-20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance claims adjusters in mid-sized firms processing 10-20 claims/month, lack of timely reminders causes missed updates. We schedule and send claims status reminders instead of manual tracking of claims status.
